title: Bare Bones X Spawn
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eb0c8132e82ce80dc408b70d50a84d74ead4c9b.png)

**This is a Bare Bones port for users who wants to play Spawn.**

- [all credits reserved for Ninnih](https://x.com/Ninnih_)

**Spawn is a QOL mod that adds animals.**
